case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. FIONA MARIE TAYLOR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, FIONA MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1169 MARKET STREET, #227, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, FIONA MARIE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED SEP-23-2009, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR, FIONA MARIE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
